mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, POST_ID AS postId, USER_ID AS userId, NICKNAME AS nickname, PARENT_ID AS parentId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, DEPTH AS depth, CONTENT AS content, DELETED_YN AS deletedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY GROUP_ID ASC, CREATED_AT ASC

SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, POST_ID AS postId, USER_ID AS userId, PARENT_ID AS parentId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, DEPTH AS depth, CONTENT AS content, DELETED_YN AS deletedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, DEPTH AS depth, DELETED_YN AS deletedYn FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_COMMENT ( POST_ID, USER_ID, NICKNAME, PARENT_ID, GROUP_ID, DEPTH, CONTENT, DELETED_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{parentId}, #{groupId}, #{depth}, #{content}, 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE PARENT_ID = #{commentId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
